\begin{figure}[ht]
\centering
\includegraphics[width=0.98\linewidth]{precision_policy_map.pdf}
\caption{Precision-placement map for exact attention. Rows correspond to explicit precision policies, columns to the principal diagnostics $E_L$, $E_P$, $E_A$, $\rho_{\mathrm{softmax}}$, and $E_{\mathrm{depth}}$. The Gaussian panel gives the synthetic baseline; the transformer panel uses a fixed head from a pretrained model. Safe policies with fp32 accumulation and fp32 softmax remain low-error, whereas low-precision softmax is the clearest failure mode through its sharp increase in $\rho_{\mathrm{softmax}}$.}
\label{fig:precision-map}
\end{figure}
